title: Disable default Seccomp profile with privileged containers
body: The OCI runtime-tools generator includes a default seccomp spec we were not accounting for. Clear it for privileged containers to make sure we don't leak Seccomp into a privileged container.

comments.body: LGTM, confirmed this actually fixes the issue.
LGTM   podman running container buildah with bud now works!

:pushpin: Commit 12d478f has been approved by `baude`
